name: Go File-read Parity Implementation Gate
implementation_scope: local copied-DB Go read-only text attachment body search parity

implemented.behavior: Go now scans bounded text attachment bodies for md/markdown/txt files under the explicit --data-dir docs/attachments subtree, then merges matching note ids into the existing read-only notes search OR clause.
path_safety: reject absolute, volume-qualified, UNC, URL-like, or colon-containing paths
reject symlinks and resolved paths outside data dir
implemented.side_effects: SQLite query_only reads plus bounded filesystem reads only

verification_fixtures.python_vs_go_diff: tests/test_phase18_go_shadow_contract.py seeds controlled md/markdown/txt body-only hits under temp data dir and compares Python Flask responses with Go responses.
verification_fixtures.safety_lock: tests/test_phase23_go_file_read_parity_implementation.py checks source-level path, extension, size, timeout, query_only, and forbidden method boundaries.
verification_fixtures.plan_lock: tests/test_phase23_go_file_read_parity_plan.py continues to lock the 23.1 contract inherited by 23.2.

not_authorized_by_23_2: Go write/file/migration implementation beyond bounded read-only body scan
Changing prism-go-readonly.service away from SQLite query_only
Production knowledge.db access or writes from Go
Pi deploy or live service reload
New AI/ML dependency, charset detection dependency, indexing cache, or server-side search cache

result.conclusion: 23.2 closes the local Go read-only text attachment body search parity gap under copied-DB/temp-data-dir tests. It does not promote live routing or file ownership beyond bounded read-only search.

allowed_next_step.title: Go Write Surface Selection Gate
allowed_next_step.scope: Plan-only candidate matrix for the first DB-only Go write surface. It must reject filesystem-coupled candidates and must not implement writes until a later gate.
not_authorized_without_approval: Production knowledge.db access or writes from Go
Pi deploy or live service reload
